name: CC18_011 (cc018_011.py)
description: Uses a 9-period TRIX indicator per stock to identify sustained momentum. Each month, holds equal shares of tech stocks whose TRIX is positive, rotating entirely to T-bills when all five are bearish.
overfit_notes: Single TRIX(9) indicator, standard textbook period, single zero-line threshold

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: TRIX(9) > 0 per stock: equal-weight among bullish stocks

rules.label: Exit
rules.text: All stocks bearish: 100% BIL

rules.label: Symbols
rules.text: Signal+Execution: AAPL, MSFT, AMZN, NVDA, GOOGL / BIL

rules.label: Universe
rules.text: Fixed basket of 5 large-cap tech stocks

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Monthly, first trading day, 30 min after open

name: CC18_068 (cc018_068.py)
description: Bull Power using a 20-day EMA as the reference trend. Slightly slower trend line captures broader intermediate-term momentum while retaining the Elder Ray framework.
overfit_notes: Bull Power with EMA(20), standard alternative period, zero threshold

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: Daily High > EMA(20) per stock (Bull Power > 0): equal-weight among bullish stocks

rules.label: Exit
rules.text: All stocks bearish: 100% BIL

rules.label: Symbols
rules.text: Signal+Execution: AAPL, MSFT, AMZN, NVDA, GOOGL / BIL

rules.label: Universe
rules.text: Fixed basket of 5 large-cap tech stocks

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Monthly, first trading day, 30 min after open

name: CC18_069 (cc018_069.py)
description: Dual Elder Ray filter: Bull Power positive AND Bear Power within 2% of zero. Targets stocks in strong uptrends where even sellers cannot push price meaningfully below the EMA.
overfit_notes: Bull Power > 0 AND Bear Power > -2% of EMA — combined condition with fitted percentage bound

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: High > EMA(13) AND Low > EMA(13) × 0.98 per stock: equal-weight among bullish

rules.label: Exit
rules.text: Either condition fails: remove stock

rules.label: Symbols

rules.label: Universe
rules.text: Fixed basket of 5 large-cap tech stocks

rules.label: Rebalance

name: CC18_070 (cc018_070.py)
description: Bull Power (EMA-13) combined with a 50-day EMA price filter. Requires both short-term intraday strength and alignment with the longer intermediate trend.
overfit_notes: Bull Power (EMA13) + EMA(50) trend gate — two indicators with AND logic

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: High > EMA(13) AND price > EMA(50) per stock: equal-weight among bullish

rules.label: Exit
rules.text: Either condition fails: remove stock

name: CC18_071 (cc018_071.py)
description: Williams %R(14) per stock with a −50 threshold. Above −50 indicates the close is in the upper half of the 14-day high-low range — a bullish relative position within the recent price channel.
overfit_notes: Single %R(14), standard period, midpoint -50 threshold

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: %R(14) > -50 per stock: equal-weight among bullish stocks

rules.label: Exit
rules.text: All stocks bearish: 100% BIL

description: Longer Williams %R(21) spanning one calendar month. The wider lookback smooths the channel measurement and produces a more stable bullish/bearish regime classification.
overfit_notes: Single %R(21), calendar-month period, midpoint -50 threshold

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: %R(21) > -50 per stock: equal-weight among bullish stocks

name: CC18_074 (cc018_074.py)
description: Williams %R(14) with a relaxed −60 threshold, requiring the close to be in the top 40% of the range. Keeps positions during moderate pullbacks that remain broadly constructive.
overfit_notes: %R(14) with threshold -60 — non-standard loose entry is mildly fitted

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: %R(14) > -60 per stock: equal-weight among bullish stocks

rules.label: Exit
rules.text: %R drops below -60: remove stock

overfit_notes: Single ADM(20), calendar-month period, zero-line threshold

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: AD Momentum(20) > 0 per stock: equal-weight among bullish stocks

name: CC18_078 (cc018_078.py)
description: 5-period short-term AD momentum per stock, capturing only the most recent week's accumulation/distribution balance. Very responsive signal useful for catching early trend shifts.
overfit_notes: Single ADM(5), short period, zero-line threshold

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: AD Momentum(5) > 0 per stock: equal-weight among bullish stocks

name: CC18_080 (cc018_080.py)
description: Dual-window AD momentum: both 5-day and 20-day accumulation/distribution must be positive. Short-term and medium-term money flow alignment filters out single-period anomalies.
overfit_notes: ADM(5) AND ADM(20) combined — dual-window AND logic raises overfit slightly

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: ADM(5) > 0 AND ADM(20) > 0 per stock: equal-weight among bullish

rules.label: Exit
rules.text: Either period turns negative: remove stock

name: CC18_086 (cc018_086.py)
description: Price above the 20-day Donchian midpoint per stock. When the close exceeds the midpoint between the 20-day highest high and lowest low, the stock is in the upper half of its channel — a bullish regime.
overfit_notes: Single Donchian midpoint(20), standard period, midpoint threshold

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: Price > Donchian midpoint(20) per stock: equal-weight among bullish stocks

rules.label: Exit
rules.text: All stocks bearish: 100% BIL

description: Longer 50-day Donchian midpoint filter, capturing a two-month price channel. Fewer transitions but higher confidence in the prevailing trend direction.
overfit_notes: Donchian midpoint(50), standard longer period, midpoint threshold

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: Price > Donchian midpoint(50) per stock: equal-weight among bullish stocks

name: CC18_088 (cc018_088.py)
description: Short 10-day Donchian midpoint filter for a rapid two-week channel assessment. The narrow lookback reacts quickly to trend reversals with a low drawdown of −37%.
overfit_notes: Donchian midpoint(10), shorter standard period, midpoint threshold

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: Price > Donchian midpoint(10) per stock: equal-weight among bullish stocks

rules.label: Exit

name: CC18_089 (cc018_089.py)
description: Donchian midpoint(20) combined with a rising channel confirmation over the past 5 bars. Both structural position and trend direction of the channel must confirm bullishness.
overfit_notes: Donchian(20) midpoint + rising condition (5-bar lookback) — combined multi-check raises overfit

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: Price > midpoint(20) AND midpoint rising over 5 days per stock: equal-weight

rules.label: Exit
rules.text: Channel flattens or price falls below midpoint: remove stock

description: Requires price to be within 10% of the 20-day Donchian upper band. Stocks near the top of their range show strong relative strength and upside breakout potential.
overfit_notes: Donchian upper(20) × 0.9 threshold — 10% band proximity is mildly fitted

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: Price > 90% of Donchian upper(20) per stock: equal-weight among bullish stocks

rules.label: Exit

overfit_notes: Single ROC(20), canonical 1-month momentum, zero threshold — minimal parameters

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: ROC(20) > 0 per stock: equal-weight among bullish stocks

overfit_notes: Single ROC(63), canonical 3-month momentum, zero threshold — minimal parameters

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: ROC(63) > 0 per stock: equal-weight among bullish stocks

name: CC18_093 (cc018_093.py)
description: Dual-period ROC requiring both 1-month and 3-month returns to be positive. Short and medium-term momentum alignment produces the highest Sharpe ratio in the catalog at 1.202 with only −30% drawdown.
overfit_notes: ROC(20) AND ROC(63) combined — dual-period AND logic, both zero thresholds

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: ROC(20) > 0 AND ROC(63) > 0 per stock: equal-weight among bullish

rules.label: Exit
rules.text: Either ROC turns negative: remove stock

name: CC18_094 (cc018_094.py)
description: ROC(20) with a +5% threshold, requiring genuine positive momentum rather than marginal gains. Filters out stocks hovering near their prior month's level.
overfit_notes: ROC(20) with threshold +5% — non-zero positive bar is mildly fitted

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: ROC(20) > 5% per stock: equal-weight among bullish stocks

rules.label: Exit

overfit_notes: Single CCI(20), standard period, zero-line threshold

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: CCI(20) > 0 per stock: equal-weight among bullish stocks

name: CC18_099 (cc018_099.py)
description: CCI(20) with a permissive threshold of −100, accepting mild bearish deviations. Keeps stocks in the portfolio during shallow corrections that don't constitute a full trend reversal.
overfit_notes: CCI(20) with threshold -100 — non-zero negative threshold is mildly fitted

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: CCI(20) > -100 per stock: equal-weight among bullish stocks

rules.label: Exit
rules.text: CCI drops below -100: remove stock

name: CC18_100 (cc018_100.py)
description: CCI(20) combined with a 50-day EMA price filter. Typical price must deviate positively from its mean AND the close must be above its trend line for a stock to qualify.
overfit_notes: CCI(20) + EMA(50) — two indicators with AND logic

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: CCI(20) > 0 AND price > EMA(50) per stock: equal-weight among bullish

rules.label: Exit
rules.text: Either condition fails: remove stock
